Subject: Shujaat collaboration — align on pilot + success criteria

Team —

• Base Athleticism Toolkit (soft‑skills substrate for early PMs)  [ref: #/topics/1]

CTAs on us this week

• Send quick follow‑up + 1‑pager outlining the two pilots.  [ref: #/ctas/3]
• Share involvement tiers/options and proposed scope.  [ref: #/ctas/4]

Proposed 30‑min holds (ET): Tue 11:30a, Wed 3:00p, Thu 1:30p. If one plays, we’ll confirm and send a calendar hold.
